column2: Kodak Black Sentenced to Over 3 Years in Prison in Weapons Case
column4: Rapper Kodak Black has been sentenced to more than three years in federal prison after pleading guilty to weapons charges stemming from his arrest just before a scheduled concert performance in May.

column2: Ford owners love this little-known feature other companies can't match
column4: The Ford SecuriCode touchpad feature is only offered by the Dearborn automaker and lets drivers in without a key.

column2: How I Got Lung Cancer at 31 Without Ever Smoking a Single Cigarette
column4: Rachael Malmberg was 31 when she received a deadly diagnosis. She is fighting her condition and has embarked upon a mission to educate others about the second leading cause of lung cancer and it has nothing to do with smoking.

column2: Man charged with stealing donation jars meant for family of murdered Waterville mother
column4: Waterville police said they have charged a man with stealing two donation jars meant to benefit the family of a mother killed last month. column2: 691,145 Californians left last year: What state did they go to?
column4: Look at the comings and goings as a ratio of ins to outs. Tiny Idaho wins this race with 497 arrivals from the Golden State for every 100 former Gem State residents who moved to California.
